title: Verify Help & Contact Screen Display
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Help & Contact screen. | Verify that the header displays the title 'Help & Contact'. | Check that the list of questions is displayed correctly.
expected_result: The header displays the title 'Help & Contact'. | The list of questions is displayed correctly.

title: Click on a Question to Expand
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Help & Contact screen. | Click on the chevron icon next to the question 'Who are we?'. | Verify that the answer to the question 'Who are we?' is expanded.
expected_result: The answer to the question 'Who are we?' is expanded.

title: Click on a Question to Collapse
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Help & Contact screen. | Click on the chevron icon next to the question 'Who are we?'. | Click on the chevron icon next to the question 'Who are we?'. | Verify that the answer to the question 'Who are we?' is collapsed.
expected_result: The answer to the question 'Who are we?' is collapsed.

title: Verify Navigation Back to Previous Screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Help & Contact screen. | Click on the back arrow in the header. | Verify that the user is navigated back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Check Accessibility of the Screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Help & Contact screen. | Perform a screen reader test to ensure all elements are accessible.
expected_result: All elements on the screen are accessible.

title: Check Usability of the Screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Help & Contact screen. | Perform a usability test to ensure the screen is easy to navigate and understand.
expected_result: The screen is easy to navigate and understand.
